Title: Classroom comparison study
Abstract
This study suggests differences across instructional conditions.
Methods
Participants (N = 93) were randomly assigned to an active condition or a comparison group.
Results
A group difference was observed, p = 0.02, Cohen's d = 0.31.
Discussion
These findings may indicate a context-sensitive effect.
References
Miller, T., & Chen, R. (2021). Example source.
Taylor, J. (2019). Another source.
